news.title:
Gujarat Gas Ltd's board reappoints Ernst & Young LLP as internal auditors for FY 2026-27.
EY brings extensive experience in CGD sector, supporting Gujarat Gas and other industry players.
news.summary:
Gujarat Gas Ltd's board reappoints Ernst & Young LLP as internal auditors for FY 2026-27.
EY brings extensive experience in CGD sector, supporting Gujarat Gas and other industry players.

news.title:
Nomura states Gujarat Gas will face major impact due to govt's gas supply rejig.
Jefferies maintains a positive outlook on Coal India amid changes.
news.summary:
Nomura states Gujarat Gas will face major impact due to govt's gas supply rejig.
Jefferies maintains a positive outlook on Coal India amid changes.

news.title:
Nomura highlights Gujarat Gas's higher industrial dependence compared to MGL, IGL.
A 20% curtailment may cut Gujarat Gas volumes by 10%, MGL, IGL by 3%.
news.summary:
Nomura highlights Gujarat Gas's higher industrial dependence compared to MGL, IGL.
A 20% curtailment may cut Gujarat Gas volumes by 10%, MGL, IGL by 3%.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirms Gujarat Gas Ltd's AAA Stable rating due to strong risk profile post GSPC, GSPL merger.
Debt-free status, superior liquidity, and internal accruals support capex and rating stability.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirms Gujarat Gas Ltd's AAA Stable rating due to strong risk profile post GSPC, GSPL merger.
Debt-free status, superior liquidity, and internal accruals support capex and rating stability.

news.title:
SIA met Gujarat Gas officials, GIDC reps on reduced gas supply impact.
Conflict between US, Israel, Iran affects natural gas supply in Gujarat.
news.summary:
SIA met Gujarat Gas officials, GIDC reps on reduced gas supply impact.
Conflict between US, Israel, Iran affects natural gas supply in Gujarat.

news.title:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.
news.summary:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.

news.title:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.
news.summary:
Shares of IGL and MGL dropped 7% and 10%, driven by US-Israel conflict impacting natural gas and crude prices.
Nomura warns IGL and MGL face Ebitda drops if LNG costs rise; Gujarat Gas issued force majeure notices to industrial clients.

news.title:
Qatar LNG disruption could impact India's gas market; Petronet, GAIL, Gujarat Gas may face pressure.
Petronet LNG might see the largest impact due to heavy reliance on Qatar supply, per JM Financial analysis.
news.summary:
Qatar LNG disruption could impact India's gas market; Petronet, GAIL, Gujarat Gas may face pressure.
Petronet LNG might see the largest impact due to heavy reliance on Qatar supply, per JM Financial analysis.

news.title:

Force majeure notices issued, restricting daily contracted quantity from March 6, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title:

Daily gas quantity restrictions initiated; insurance excludes war acts, impact remains uncertain.

news.title:

The ESG rating was independently prepared using public data without company engagement.

news.title:
Gujarat Gas serves 23.83L domestic, 4,454 industrial, and 15,900 commercial customers.
Q3 FY26: Added 38k domestic customers; industrial gas volume fell 10% QoQ; CNG sales rose 11% YoY.
news.summary:
Gujarat Gas serves 23.83L domestic, 4,454 industrial, and 15,900 commercial customers.
